sourceMovie.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Dukes of Hazzard works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The comedy and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Johnny English Strikes Again
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Dukes of Hazzard clicked for you, Johnny English Strikes Again (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and adventure, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: First Blood
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Dukes of Hazzard clicked for you, First Blood (1982) is a strong next stop: both trade in adventure and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Dukes of Hazzard?
faq.answer: Try Johnny English Strikes Again, First Blood, They Call Me Trinity—each shares DNA with The Dukes of Hazzard while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Dukes of Hazzard?
faq.answer: The Dukes of Hazzard (2005) is best described as Comedy, Adventure, Action. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Dukes of Hazzard part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "The Dukes of Hazzard (Reboot) Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
